name: get_listing
description: Fetch live details for a specific listing. Use when you have a listing_id, or pass name and city to do a fuzzy search. Call this when KB data may be stale or the caller asks about details not in your notes (e.g. cancellation policy, exact check-in time).

listing_id.description: The LISTING_ID from the knowledge base entry. Preferred over name+city.

name.description: Partial or full title of the listing (fallback when listing_id is unknown).

city.description: City where the listing is located (fallback when listing_id is unknown).

name: check_availability
description: Check whether a listing is available for the requested dates. You MUST call this before confirming any booking or promising that dates are open. Returns available (bool) and any conflicting date ranges.

listing_id.description: The LISTING_ID of the listing to check.

name: create_booking
description: Create a confirmed booking after the caller has verbally agreed to all details. Returns a booking_id — read the last 6 characters back to the caller as their confirmation code.

listing_id.description: The LISTING_ID of the listing to book.

check_in.description: Check-in / start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

check_out.description: Check-out / end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. For single-day events use the same date as check_in.

contact_name.description: Full name of the caller / primary guest.

contact_phone.description: Callback phone number for the booking.

name: transfer_to_host
description: Retrieve the host's phone number so Retell can transfer the call. Use for special requests, complaints, refunds, payment disputes, or anything outside your decision authority.

listing_id.description: The LISTING_ID of the listing whose host should receive the transfer.
